name: PRIEST IN DISGUISE | Vennilleth
description:
The priest is actually a DEMON ?!

Your friends and yourself had theories and were suspicious about him... So you decided to investigate ! Was he another creep ? Or a non-human creature..?

Helllooooo~ ! This is my first bot ! If this content offends you, just don't use it, no mean comments are needed... If you have any tips, you can put them in the comments, if you'd like !
